title: 笑顔は続くよどこまでも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm accompanying Daitaku Helios and Mejiro
Palmer to the concert venue today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being invited to be a guest performer by
the famous international singer N.B., Daitaku
Helios's plan to hype up Japan grew to a global
scale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a member of the new Operation: Get the
World Hyped, I decide to attend the event
myself.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Gahhh, I'm so excited! Are we there yet?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, what's with this traffic? Wait, it goes all
the way to the venue?! NOOO!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This is bad... What did the concert organizer say
when you called, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
If we don't make it in time, they'll have to
cancel your guest appearance...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! It's so over...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wait, we can just run there!
choice_data_list: All the way to the venue?! That's really far!
All the way to the venue?! That's really far!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Facts! But if I don't show up on time, that's the biggest yikes of them all! I've gotta get my smile to everyone, so there's no choice but to run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Now we're talkin'! Come on, Trainer! Let's get
running!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆ Here we go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! This place is faaar! Keep running, Palmer! And how's my producer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff! You don't have to... tell me twice! We'll match your pace, so don't push yourself too hard, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Passerby
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me! You're the Hype Channel producer,
right? I love what you guys do! You can use my
bicycle if you like!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thanks a bunch! You seriously saved our
producer! Oh, and a new legend's about to be
born today, so stay tuned to the channel!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wheeze! Huff... Pant... Cough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: We—wheeze...—made it!

text_block_list.name: Concert Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay?! Here, sit down and catch your
breath!

text_block_list.name: Concert Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Um... Do you think you'll still be able to perform?
I don't want to push you if you're not up to it.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Aha... That's nice of you! But...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: I got this! I wanna perform!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
There are people out there who feel happier just
by looking at my smile. They said seeing me
makes them feel better.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
After hearing that, there's nothing I wanna do
more than go smile my heart out and cheer
everyone up!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm an Umamusume! Performing at a
concert right after doing a full-out sprint is
nothing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: N.B.
text_block_list.text:
That’s the spirit! What did I tell you? These girls
got it.

text_block_list.name: Concert Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, N.B... Hehe, you're so right. Her smile's
absolutely dazzling.

text_block_list.name: N.B.
text_block_list.text: Come on, girls! It's showtime!

text_block_list.name: Helios and Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Showtime!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the reason Daitaku Helios's smile brings
joy to so many people is because she sincerely
wants it to. And that desire fuels her when she
runs.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
DJ Helios is in the house! C'mon, everybody! Say
heeey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she starts her set, there's no hint of exhaustion
whatsoever in her smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The concert is broadcast around the world, and
her happy face trends across the globe for being
as "bright as the sun."

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wait, it was broadcast on satellite TV? And the whole world saw it? That means... my smile went out into space! That's straight up outta this world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When people see the pictures, Daitaku Helios's
sprint to the venue becomes as hot a topic as the
concert itself.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Look! Everyone who saw me is smiling! You know
what this means, right? Operation: Get the World
Hyped was a total success!

text_block_list.name: Helios and Palmer
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆
